robin-map
=========

# Available modules


The overview below shows which robin-map installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using robin-map, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load robin-map/1.4.0-GCCcore-14.3.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
